description: Basic PNG QR code with default options
expected_behavior: Runs generate_qr.py with --data https://github.com/jaqg --output qr --size 10 --format png --error H. Reports file path, size, encoded content. Prints both LaTeX snippets.

description: SVG format with custom output name
expected_behavior: Runs generate_qr.py with --format svg --output paper-doi. Reports paper-doi.svg. LaTeX snippet uses \includesvg and notes svg package required.
Runs generate_qr.py with --size 20 --error L --output big-qr. Does NOT explain error correction levels inline — those are handled by the script.
